allow: Bash(node -e "const { PrismaClient } = require\('@prisma/client'\); const c = new PrismaClient\(\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(Object.keys\(c\)\)\);")
Bash(node -e "const { PrismaClient } = require\('@prisma/client'\); const c = new PrismaClient\({ adapter: null }\); ")
Bash(node -e "const {defineConfig} = require\('jest'\); const c = defineConfig\({setupFilesAfterEach: []}\); console.log\(Object.keys\(c\)\);")
Bash(node -e "const {defineConfig} = require\('jest'\); const c = defineConfig\({setupFilesAfterFramework: ['./setup.ts']}\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(c\)\);")
Bash(node -e "const {defineConfig} = require\('./node_modules/jest'\); const c = defineConfig\({setupFilesAfterFramework: ['./setup.ts']}\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(c\)\);")
